critique: Excellent functional completeness: add, toggle, delete, filter by status, and clear-completed all work correctly, with localStorage persistence surviving page reloads. The custom circular checkbox and slide-in animation add delight without over-engineering. Visual clarity is high — good contrast, clear typography hierarchy, and a calm colour palette. Responsiveness is strong; the form stacks on very small screens. Minor code-quality note: the render function rebuilds the entire list on every action; for the stated scope this is fine, but a keyed diffing approach would be cleaner at scale.
